overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character with a large yellow backpack traversing a misty, rocky coastal landscape. The character walks through a narrow canyon, emerges onto a cliffside overlooking a vast body of water with massive waterfalls, and eventually wades into the shallow water between towering cliffs.

agents.ego_description: walking carefully through the narrow rocky canyon, navigating the uneven stream bed

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face forming the left boundary of the canyon
steep rocky cliff face forming the right boundary of the canyon
uneven ground with rocks and shallow water flowing through the canyon
scattered large rocks blocking parts of the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed canyon with steep rock walls on both sides. The ground is a rocky stream bed with scattered boulders, and the sky is mostly blocked by the canyon walls above.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty coastal cliffside with massive waterfall

events.description: exits the narrow canyon into a wide open coastal area with massive cliffs and waterfalls
massive waterfall and misty sea come into view as the character emerges from the canyon

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky shoreline beside a vast misty body of water, approaching a massive waterfall

entered.detail: tall vertical cliff face rising directly from the shoreline
enormous waterfall cascading down the distant cliff face creating heavy mist
vast expanse of water shrouded in fog and mist from the waterfall
dark volcanic rocks and gravel forming the shoreline path

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the canyon onto a wide misty coastline. A massive waterfall dominates the distant view, creating a hazy atmosphere over the water. The character walks along the rocky shore with a tall cliff on the left and the misty sea on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coastal water between cliff faces

events.description: character steps off the rocky shore and enters the shallow water
character continues walking deeper into the water, creating splashes

agents.ego_description: wading into the shallow coastal water, moving away from the shoreline into the misty water

entered.detail: calm shallow water covering the ground, reflecting the overcast sky

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the rocky shore and enters the shallow water, wading through the calm coastal shallows. The cliff face recedes into the distance on the left while misty mountains loom in the far background across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character travels from the confines of a narrow canyon into a vast, misty coastal expanse. It begins within a steep-walled rocky gorge, moving along a stream bed scattered with boulders under a restricted view of the sky. As the character emerges from the canyon, the environment opens into a wide coastline where a massive, distant waterfall creates a hazy atmosphere over the sea. The scene then shifts from the rocky shore to the water's edge, with the camera following the character as they wade into the calm shallows. Finally, the towering cliff face recedes to the left while misty mountains loom in the far background across the open water.
